summary: staged_cleanups queue: model-proposed rewrites for hard-wrapped prose behind the apply gate
description: Phase 2 of todo:82e3a09d, scope narrowed by the audit: after the clean_bodies regex extension and the 50438e23 apparatus work, the remaining damage class is hard-wrapped prose (mandaean gnostic-john-baptizer texts, hard_wrap 0.45-0.86 on worst chunks) which regex cannot safely unwrap. Build staged_cleanups mirroring staged_tags/staged_edges: local 4B/27B models on the 3090 propose per-chunk rewrites (unwrap lines, preserve every word — diff-checkable), reviewer accepts/rejects behind the usual apply gate (no auto-promote), apply writes TOMLs + recomputes token_count like clean_bodies --apply, then re-export. Reuse guru-review UI patterns for the diff view.
